femoral_wl_note: 3D uses Euclidean condyle-edge distance (AP spread 80vox); ML-only uses front-view projected width. Report both; straddles normal(<1.24)/OA(>1.3) boundary.
iioc_height_compartment: lateral (max of medial/lateral; medial ~0.69mm, lateral ~0.75mm at auto-gp; symmetric -> growth plate not misplaced)

interpretation_applied_after_NOT_a_gate.femoral_wl_cutoffs: normal<1.24 / OA>1.3 (ROC 1.245/1.312/1.282). This specimen W/L 1.22(ML)-1.32(3D): borderline, straddles boundary.
interpretation_applied_after_NOT_a_gate.tibial_hw_cutoffs: OA<0.282, gray-zone 0.28-0.30. This specimen H/W ~0.215 (band 0.18-0.26): below cutoff = OA-consistent, robust to growth-plate uncertainty.
interpretation_applied_after_NOT_a_gate.coherence: femur (borderline-OA) and tibia (OA) both point OA-ward; W/L not an implausible >1.5 anomaly.
